full_text:
Wu Yan (Shize) 吾彥 (士則)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Yan (吾彥), styledShize (士則). Held out in his city of Jianping until Sun Hao surrendered. Wu Yan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
